goals.description: Complete the 'Course assignment — analysis section' to 100% and submit before Monday's 18:00 deadline.
goals.rationale: My progress has jumped from 0.92 to 0.97, confirming my deliberative capacity is intact. The remaining ~3% requires isolation to avoid the friction of social interaction (teammate_A or cohort_3) which would degrade focus. Securing this high-value academic payoff justifies deferring all other tasks, including the reading assignment due at 20:00, as the latter offers no strategic advantage given my current sleep debt.

goals.description: Send a brief, non-apologetic text to teammate_A acknowledging receipt of the missed reading material, then immediately disengage.
goals.rationale: This is a necessary procedural step to maintain the facade of reliability regarding the missed reading, but it carries zero value toward my primary objective of completing the analysis. It serves solely to avoid interpersonal friction. Once the script is sent, further engagement is irrational given my current sleep debt and the impending high-stakes deadline.

goals.description: Execute a strict power-down routine at 04:00 to address the 2-hour sleep deficit, treating tomorrow as a strategic recovery day rather than a source of guilt.
goals.rationale: While health is listed as a priority, my deliberative nature dictates that forcing compliance with soft tasks when cognitive resources are low leads to long-term inefficiency. The knowledge gap from deferring the reading is an acceptable temporary sacrifice if it secures the high-value outcome of the analysis assignment.
